reviews.comment:
Lugar tranquilo. Las chicas que atienden son muy amables. Se les terminan rápido las facturas. Ricas cosas para pasar un rato y te hacen descuento por ser socio del Automóvil Club Argentino

(Translated by Google)
A quiet place. The staff are very friendly. They sell out of pastries quickly. Delicious food to enjoy while you're there, and they offer a discount for members of the Argentine Automobile Club.
